summary: First testing iteration - Hotel Management App. Full backend (23/23 pytest passes) and frontend (admin+rezeption flows, RBAC) verified successfully against public URL.

minor.issue: Returns JSON array, not actual CSV; frontend must do CSV conversion. Consider proper text/csv response with Content-Disposition header on backend.
Generic 500 on OpenAI failure; errors should be classified (e.g., 422 for unreadable ID, 502 for upstream LLM error).
access_token cookie uses secure=False even on HTTPS preview domain; should be secure=True and samesite=none for cross-site cookies in production.

action_items: (Optional) Harden cookie flags: secure=True & samesite='none' for production preview over HTTPS.
(Optional) Return proper CSV from /api/accounting/export with text/csv content-type.
(Optional) Differentiate HTTP error codes in /api/scan-id for client-side handling.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 640 lines - split into routers (auth/bookings/accounting/scan) for maintainability.
Sync PyMongo calls inside async FastAPI handlers - switch to motor (AsyncIOMotorClient) to avoid blocking the event loop under load.
JWT_SECRET hardcoded in .env committed to repo - rotate before production.
No pagination on /api/bookings or /api/accounting - will be slow at scale.
ObjectId conversion on booking_id in path params lacks try/except - invalid IDs will raise 500 instead of 400/404.
CORS_ORIGINS='*' in .env is unused (code uses FRONTEND_URL) - remove dead config.
check_brute_force / record_failed_login are declared async but call sync pymongo - harmless but misleading.
seed_data_creation: Test suite creates and cleans up TEST_ prefixed bookings/accounting entries. One residual income entry 'Check-out: TEST_John Doe - Zimmer T101' was created by the check-out test but the source booking was deleted (minor stale data - not impacting tests).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Run: `cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. All 3 roles, full booking lifecycle (create->check-in->check-out->auto accounting entry->delete), accounting RBAC, CSV export, and /api/scan-id auth all verified. Frontend: login, dashboard (6 stat cards), bookings table, accounting page, logout, and RBAC (rezeption cannot see Buchhaltung nav) all work. UI is clean German dashboard with sidebar nav, proper data-testids present.
rca of the issue: No bugs found - all features working as expected.
